bar.name: Stuora Bar
bar.spirit: No reason, no rush, just one good drink.

items.name: Raspberry & Pine Hanky Panky
items.description: Tart raspberry over resinous pine and herbal shadow

items.name: Tomato & Sprats Mary
items.description: Savoury and briny, smoke curling underneath

items.name: Cowberry Negroni
items.description: Wild lingonberry sharpening a bittersweet dusk

items.name: Mushroom Old Fashioned
items.description: Earthy, woodland-deep, wrapped in velvet warmth

items.name: Cherry Boulevardier
items.description: Dark cherry folded into bitter, brooding whisky

items.name: Milk Punch
items.description: Silken and clarified, softly spiced and cool

items.name: Vanilla & Grape Daiquiri
items.description: Bright grape lifted by a whisper of vanilla

items.name: Quince Gimlet
items.description: Honeyed quince, taut and quietly botanical

items.name: Rhubarb Fizz
items.description: Tart rhubarb, effervescent and blush-pink

items.name: Raspberry Clover Club
items.description: Tart raspberry beneath a pale silken foam

items.name: Cherry Manhattan
items.description: Dark cherry, spice and velvet in one glass

items.name: Redcurrant & Hibiscus Margarita
items.description: Tart redcurrant and hibiscus, bright and floral

items.name: Blackcurrant & Chilli Mule
items.description: Deep blackcurrant, ginger snap, a slow chilli ember

items.name: Passionfruit Vodka
items.description: Golden and tropical, tart with a sunlit edge

items.name: Blackcurrant & Chilli Vodka
items.description: Dark berry chased by a slow chilli warmth

items.name: Smoked Plum Vodka
items.description: Ripe plum drawn through gentle woodsmoke

items.name: Hrenovuha Vodka
items.description: Horseradish fire, bracing and unapologetically bold

items.name: Tomato & Sprats Mary Vodka
items.description: Savoury and briny with a smoky depth

items.name: Vanilla & Grape Rum
items.description: Mellow vanilla over ripe, rounded grape

items.name: Ananas & Coconut Rum
items.description: Sun-warmed pineapple and soft toasted coconut

items.name: Redcurrant & Hibiscus Tequila
items.description: Tart redcurrant laced with floral hibiscus

items.name: Raspberry & Pine Gin
items.description: Bright raspberry over resinous forest pine

items.name: Rabarbar Gin
items.description: Crisp rhubarb, tart and coolly botanical

items.name: Carrot & Dill Bourbon
items.description: Earthy carrot brightened with a herbal dill lift

items.name: Mushroom Bourbon
items.description: Woodland-earthy, deep and velvet-smooth

items.name: Cherry Bourbon
items.description: Dark cherry steeped into warm, oaken depth

items.name: Open Sandwich Selection
items.description: Four small open sandwiches with assorted toppings: aspic, cured pork fat, pâté, sprats, beef tartare, and pork tartare.

items.name: Pickled Selection
items.description: Pickled cucumbers, marinated onions, olives, and mini pickled garlic.

items.name: House Pickles
items.description: Pickled cucumbers, marinated onions, olives, and mini pickled garlic.

items.name: Jasmin Oolong Kombucha
items.description: Floral jasmine and oolong, gently sparkling and cool
